subtitle: AI thesis copilot grounded on your documents
heroTitle: Write your thesis faster with accountable RAG.
heroDesc: Upload PDFs, manage advising sessions, and get structured answers with citations. Built for final-year students who need academic-quality output.
feature1Desc: Answers are grounded in your documents, not generic model opinions.
feature2Desc: Responses arrive in real time while the model reasons and drafts.
feature3Desc: From upload and citation review to Markdown export in one flow.
faqQ1: Can I reuse existing user data?
faqA1: Yes. Prisma schema uses @@map to stay compatible with legacy Flask table names.
faqA2: Yes. Credentials auth uses bcryptjs and is compatible with Flask-Bcrypt $2b$ hashes.
faqQ3: Do I need deployment before testing?
faqA3: No. You can test locally as long as required env variables are configured.
sideLoginDesc: An AI RAG advisor that helps you build thesis arguments with evidence.
sideRegisterDesc: Sign up and start a structured thesis workspace grounded in your own files.
dbUnavailableDesc: Please refresh in a few seconds. If this keeps happening, check your database/network connection.
